textByHash.593a53e7212c130544dd14c0d0bb08c8b1d1d6b9: The only problem I find is that the lighting's not very good, which means I make mistakes when cutting cloth.
textByHash.68423fd4d3bedafc53ae6630f2d9cc3b605f8952: I don't like these rumours I've heard about the other caves, though.
textByHash.893602aeaf4d16d68a46af3d6ecf08e1ff4254c1: Can I help you with anything, Your Royal Highness?
textByHash.94272912845199f5fac5be83eb09bff90372c89c: It's no use, I'm done for!
textByHash.98c19d678912788ad3e7137640ab258052292a55: It's very spacious. One of the dwarves said that the caves go on for miles!
textByHash.9bb249ec2c389e8f4bbd6eeaaaa6fdea400c1b07: They say there might be monsters in there. You'd best talk to the dwarves who are excavating - they'd know about these stories.
textByHash.b1820d9977ef079bbcc7c47997a6cb52bc5c900f: It's very spacious down here. One of the dwarves said that the caves go on for miles!
textByHash.d37198feb7fe4d7c86c9ab8ed9d55284d7c6a638: Welcome to Miscellania's first clothing store! We sell clothing made especially for Fremenniks and Dwarves.
